Our Mission

Connecting Bothell neighbors
with the help they need.

Community Connect is a volunteer-driven platform that breaks down barriers between Bothell residents and the resources around them — from food pantries and job training to after-school programs and health clinics.

+
Bothell Volunteers
+
Local Resources Listed
Years Serving Bothell
Community Events / Year

Inclusive

Resources for every age, background, and need — no one in Bothell left behind.

Trusted

Every resource is reviewed and verified by our team before it goes live.

Community-Led

Built by Bothell residents, for Bothell residents — you shape the hub.

Impactful

We track real-world difference and celebrate every connection made.

What We Offer

Everything your community needs, in one place.

From finding volunteers to discovering local programs, our platform simplifies community engagement for everyone.

Resource Directory

Search and filter hundreds of verified local resources by category, location, and availability. Find exactly what you or someone you know needs.

Resource Directory

Learn More

Community Events

Discover upcoming cleanups, food drives, workshops, and neighborhood events. Join in person or find out how to organize your own.

Community Events

Learn More

Volunteer Matching

Tell us your skills and availability, and we'll connect you with organizations that need exactly what you can offer.

Volunteer Matching

Learn More

Submit a Resource

Know of a program that helped you or someone in your community? Add it so others can benefit too. All submissions reviewed by our team.

Submit a Resource

Learn More

Impact Tracking

See the real-world difference our community is making — volunteer hours logged, families helped, and events organized, all visualized.

Impact Tracking

Learn More

Interactive Map

Find resources near you using our integrated Google Maps feature. Get directions, hours, and contact info at a glance.

Interactive Map

Learn More
Featured Resources

Three resources making a difference right now.

●Food & Nutrition⭐ Featured
Food & Nutrition

Community Food Bank

Providing nutritious meals and groceries to families in need every week. No income verification required for first visit.

Downtown DistrictMon–Sat 9am–5pm
●Education🔥 Popular
Education

Free Tutoring Center

Volunteer tutors available for K–12 and adult learners in math, reading, and science. Drop-in and appointment options.

Eastside LibraryAll Ages
●Health🆕 New
Health

Community Health Clinic

Free and sliding-scale medical, dental, and mental health services for uninsured and underinsured residents.

Westpark Ave(425) 806-6600
View All Resources
Community Stories

Hear from the people we've helped.

“
★★★★★

Through Community Connect, I found amazing volunteer tutors who helped my daughter excel in math. What started as weekly sessions turned into a lasting mentorship that changed her academic trajectory.

MR
Maria Rodriguez
Parent, Eastside Neighborhood
Our Founders

Built by community members, for the community.

Meet the team behind Community Connect.

RA
TR
SM
SS

Ronit Agarwal

Co-Founder & Executive Director

Our founding team came together with one shared belief: every resident deserves easy access to the resources around them. We built this platform to bridge the gap between community members and the services they need. 

CommunityConnect

Building stronger communities through collaboration, service, and shared resources.

figXin
